channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Virginia School District Integrates DEI into AI Tools
item.description: The district is incorporating diversity, equity, and inclusion initiatives into its use of artificial intelligence.

item.title: Supreme Court Justices Delay Ruling
item.description: Reports suggest liberal justices may be delaying a decision, following scrutiny of previous delays.

item.title: Michael Jackson Biopic Sparks Debate Over Allegations
item.description: The film's success highlights a public shift, even as media scrutiny of past allegations continues.

item.title: Canada's Sovereign Malinvestment Fund
item.description: Prime Minister Carney is pursuing industrial policy, described as a potential failure.
